---
title: "The Rev. Roger Buston"
---

## The Rev. Roger Buston

**Dates:** (1807/8-1886)

### Description

Vicar of Twyford

### Biography

He married (1850) Anne Mary Dennis (1824/5-26 Oct 1895)  and their children included Roger (b. 1851/2); Philip Thomas (b. 1853);  Edith M. (b. 1854/5); Charles b. (1855/6); Arthur b. 1856/7; Anne (b. 1859/60); Mary Phillis Katherine (b. 1864/5-3 Dec 1899) Ellanar Sarah (b. 1865/6); Margaret Elizabeth G. (b. 1869/70) [census returns; <i>Times</i>  for Phyllis and Anne Mary’s deaths]

### Letters

- Letter from Sept 11th [1886]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
